CalibrationVM.ErrorBodyVocalsMash: Sorry, too many up pitches detected per beat.
CalibrationVM.ErrorBodyVocalsWindow: Sorry, up pitches are too inconsistent, try again, reducing ambient noise.
CalibrationVM.ErrorBodyVideoMash:
Sorry, we’re detecting too many button presses.

Only press the button once for each bounce.
CalibrationVM.ErrorBodyGemVideoMash:
Sorry, we’re detecting too many button presses.

Only press the button once for each note that enters the hit zone outline.
CalibrationVM.ErrorBodyAudioMash:
Sorry, we’re detecting too many button presses.

Only press the button once per drum hit.
CalibrationVM.ErrorBodyAudioWindow:
Sorry, we’re having trouble with the consistency of your button presses.

Try pressing down and holding on the drum sound, then release halfway to the next drum sound, or a short time later.
CalibrationVM.ErrorBodyVideoWindow:
Sorry, we’re having trouble with the consistency of your button presses.

Try pressing down and holding when the ball hits the bar, then release when the ball is at the top.
CalibrationVM.ErrorBodyGemVideoWindow:
Sorry, we’re having trouble with the consistency of your button presses.

Try pressing down and holding when the note is centered in the hit zone outline, then release some time later.
